what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter ledger record for a design-source image asset named capital-raise/p-08; it points to a JPEG blob, labels it as design ground-truth, and records provenance metadata such as author session and creation time.
observations: Markdown file with YAML frontmatter and a one-line body caption
Identifies an image asset via id capital-raise/p-08 and address image://design-source/capital-raise/p-08
References blob b2:0ca760b7069b314f565b3c9700712d83 with mime image/jpeg
Width and height are both declared as 0
Source is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image record
Asset is referenced by blob URI rather than filesystem path
No outgoing links or relationships are recorded
concerns: w and h are 0, suggesting missing or uncomputed image dimensions
links is empty, so no explicit relationships to other ledger entries or pages
No content description or alt text beyond the filename
It is unclear whether the blob reference is currently resolvable
notes: A provenance stub for a capital-raise design image that references a JPEG blob but omits dimensions and relationships.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does capital-raise/p-08.jpg contain?
Are there intended links to pages, designs, or other assets that were not captured?
Is blob b2:0ca760b7069b314f565b3c9700712d83 accessible and immutable?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a design ground-truth image asset, and the file does that as a metadata stub; the only mismatch is that width/height are unset.
intention_signals: It appears intended to catalog and preserve authorship, timestamp, and a stable reference to a source image used in the capital-raise design set.
novelty: The image record uses both an image:// channel address and a blob URI while declaring zero dimensions, which is unusual for an image ledger entry.
contribution: Provides a stable, timestamped, authorship-attributed pointer to a design-source JPEG blob and explicitly labels it as ground-truth, giving a fused system a resolvable asset record and provenance anchor.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter metadata record for the design-source JPEG image capital-raise/p-08, referencing blob b2:0ca760b7069b314f565b3c9700712d83 and labeling it as design ground-truth, with zero width/height and no links.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to catalog and preserve provenance for a source image used in the capital-raise design channel.
